{
  "checks": {
    "check_balance_sheet": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Balance check: ✓ all periods - Assets = Liabilities + Equity"},
    "check_cash_flow_reconciles": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Cash reconciles to balance sheet ✓ - ending cash on CFS matches BS"},
    "check_pnl_flows_to_bs": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "RE change: Y0→Y1: -723. NI=-661. Diff=$62K SBC - properly reconciled"},
    "check_opening_balances": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Beginning Cash Y1: 4,800 matches Y0 ending cash"},
    "check_no_hardcoded": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Revenue growth rates (50%, 45%, 40%) appear hardcoded without clear derivation from unit economics"},
    "check_growth_from_assumptions": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Growth rates stated as assumptions but not derived from NRR, churn, and new logo metrics"},
    "check_unit_economics_consistent": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "ACV grows from $35K to $55K but model shows $42K-$51K actual - inconsistent with stated assumptions"},
    "check_no_circular_refs": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "No circular references noted or apparent in the model structure"},
    "check_three_statements": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Income Statement, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow Statement all present"},
    "check_assumptions_page": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Comprehensive assumptions section with growth rates, margins, headcount plan"},
    "check_time_granularity": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Consistent annual periods (Y1, Y2, Y3) throughout all statements"},
    "check_full_horizon": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Full 3-year horizon covered across all statements"},
    "check_no_negative_revenue": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "All revenue figures positive: $4.6M, $6.7M, $9.4M"},
    "check_cash_not_negative": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Cash remains positive: $4.8M → $3.0M, though declining"},
    "check_margins_plausible": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Gross margins 70-74% reasonable for SaaS, op margins -15% to -1% plausible for growth stage"},
    "check_headcount_math": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "83 headcount × $148K = $12.3M but total OpEx only $7.0M in Y3"},
    "check_tax_rate": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "No tax provision applied despite positive interest income"},
    "check_periods_labeled": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Clear Y1, Y2, Y3 labeling throughout"},
    "check_units_specified": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Units clearly specified as ($000s) in financial statements"},
    "check_inputs_vs_outputs": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Assumptions section clearly separated from calculated financial statements"}
  },
  "rubric": {
    "rubric_assumption_quality": {"score": 2, "verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Assumptions stated but internally inconsistent - NRR vs analyst headcount, implementation timing vs revenue recognition"},
    "rubric_scenario_robustness": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Three scenarios (Bear/Base/Bull) with sensitivity analysis on key drivers like NRR and churn"},
    "rubric_operational_realism": {"score": 2, "verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Multiple operational inconsistencies noted: analyst team growth vs customer expansion, implementation timing vs revenue recognition"},
    "rubric_cash_flow_awareness": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Cash flow properly modeled with working capital changes, burn rate and runway calculated"},
    "rubric_decision_utility": {"score": 3, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Model provides scenario analysis and key metrics, but internal inconsistencies limit decision-making reliability"}
  }
}
